plugins.name: governed-second-brain
plugins.description: A governed second brain for Claude Code — ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory with deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process, no network. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet.
plugins.author: Jeremy Longshore
